title: Hezbollah is willing to cooperate with a cease-fire with Israel. For now.
summary_full: The leader of the Iran-backed militia said that a more durable peace with Israel would require the fulfillment of a list of long-standing demands.
summary_public: The leader of the Iran-backed militia said that a more durable peace with Israel would require the fulfillment of a list of long-standing demands.

IL.label: positive
IL.evidence: cooperate with a cease-fire with Israel
